title: Updates on Carolingian UI
content:
Version 2.17.0:

  • Disabling Custom Fonts Added option to disable individual custom font settings in case there's conflicts with certain glyph fonts - GM can keep default ui fonts and just change titles, or any combination of the 4 custom fonts

Version 2.16.x:

  • Enforce Settings to Players You can now enforce Carolingian UI settings to players individually using the lock icon beside each setting.

Version 2.15.x:

  • Docking cameras to bottom Introduces ability to drag A/V camera group and dock it above macro hotbar.

If you like this module, consider supporting me on Patreon.

Join the discussion on Discord or visit the Github repository.
